key_insights: India highest LinkedIn apply rate: 18.73% (median 18%), nearly 2x global average
US leads volume (20,235 jobs), 8.96% avg apply rate, 16.22% view-to-apply conversion
Saturday best day to post globally (8.96%), Thursday 2nd (8.52%)
December elevated apply rates across all markets (US: 14.82%, UK: 10.97%)
Posting duration near-zero correlation with apply rate (-0.02) -- short rotations effective
Software Engineer highest-volume title (3,561 jobs), 233 avg views per posting
Warehouse Associate highest apply rate among top titles at 15.61%
UAE 16.34% apply rate, 4x overweighted in ROI allocation
97% applications via ATS, only 3% LinkedIn native apply
500 slots can serve 2,500-3,000 jobs/day with timezone rotation across 11 countries
LinkedIn peak apply hours: 8-10am and 5-7pm local time per country
